item.gmt.ring_of_radiance.tooltip: A ring that purify and burn phantom. It's power is to raw for you to put it on right now.
item.gmt.ring_of_radiance.tooltip.shiftk: Yes. This is a Hollow Knight Reference.
gmt.void.fell_into_void: █: You have fallen into the void, welcome to The Event Horizon or the Outer Shell of the Void.
gmt.void.cannot_break_blocks: █: This is the Void. You cannot exactly break 'nothing'
gmt.void.cannot_place_blocks: █: Don't try to get Their attention. You are already lucky to be Alive.
gmt.death.void.soul_couldnt_support: The soul of %s couldn't support the Void.
